# Zscaler Security Operations & Agentic SecOps | Zscaler

**Source:** https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/security-operations
**Captured:** 2026-04-24 via WebFetch.

---

## Core Offering

Zscaler Security Operations modernizes SecOps through AI-powered workflows that leverage Zscaler's network telemetry, third-party data integration, and inline zero trust controls. The platform aims to help organizations "assess risk, detect threats and contain breaches in minutes, not days."

## Key Components

**Agentic SecOps Architecture**
The solution deploys intelligent agents trained on 11+ years of threat detection data to operate at machine speed, complementing human security teams. These agents correlate Zscaler telemetry with external alerts to identify suspicious patterns rapidly.

**Exposure Management Suite**
- Asset Exposure Management: Organizational asset visibility with coverage gap analysis
- Unified Vulnerability Management: Security findings prioritized with business context
- Risk360: Zero trust configuration assessment and risk quantification
- Continuous Threat Exposure Management (CTEM): Scalable attack surface reduction

**Threat Management Services**
- Deception technology deploying honeypots across infrastructure
- Red Canary Managed Detection and Response (MDR) integration
- 24/7 managed threat hunting led by security experts

## AI Capabilities

The platform's AI agents achieve "99.7% threat accuracy" by analyzing Zscaler's inline network data, identifying compromised users, and recommending proportionate security controls—capabilities that "detect and intercept malicious users" where traditional endpoint defenses create blind spots.

## Integration with Red Canary

Red Canary MDR extends SOC capabilities, providing industry-leading threat detection and response services to augment existing security operations teams.

## Note on EASM
The product URL https://www.zscaler.com/products-and-solutions/external-attack-surface-management redirects to this Security Operations page, indicating EASM is positioned as a component of the broader Security Operations / Exposure Management portfolio rather than a standalone product page.

## Additional Context (from web search)
Zscaler expects the Agentic SecOps products portfolio to surpass $400M in ARR in fiscal year 2026. Agentic SecOps integrates with OpenAI and Anthropic AI models for advanced threat detection and response automation.
